title: critoniopsis pichinchensis
intro: Critoniopsis pichinchensis, a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, is native to Ecuador and is also known as the Pichincha Critoniopsis. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Critoniopsis pichinchensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or decoction, and its leaves and flowers can be used to make herbal teas, tinctures, and salves.
